texto: During the shoot in November 2003, I was vaguely aware of the stylist’s sulky demeanor and eye-rolling vibe, but I blocked her out. Some fashion people are snotty drama queens; this is not news. Whatever was going on with her, I was determined to be positive and not get infected by her energy. Later, Fiorella told me that the entire time I was in makeup, the stylist had been clomping up and down the hall, sputtering into her cell phone, “I can’t believe I have to style a FAT GIRL!” Believe it, bitch.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Crystal Renn sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “During the shoot in November 2003, I was vaguely aware of the stylist’s sulky demeanor and eye-ro…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, fashion, fat-chicks, útil em momentos de fat-chicks e models.

texto: We can always find each other, we girls with secrets.
explicacao: Citação de Crystal Renn sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “We can always find each other, we girls with secrets.” articula reflexao, anorexia, secrets em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como secrets.
